claims.claim: We report results from a continuous-serving stress campaign evaluating a per-request attention-sink retention patch for vLLM 0.19.1, using Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct under an OpenAI-compatible serving interface.

evidence_refs.quote: # vLLM Per-Request Attention-Sink Retention Under Continuous Serving: A 3B-Model Stress Campaign

claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: Across four paired baseline/retention configurations—varying concurrency (c8, c16), request count (n96–n256), and output length (64–128 tokens)—we observe zero request errors in all conditions and no paired p95 latency regression exceeding the pre-specified 10% kill gate.

evidence_refs.quote: # vLLM Per-Request Attention-Sink Retention Under Continuous Serving: A 3B-Model Stress Campaign

claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: Three of four pairs show p95 latency improvements of 8–11% with retention enabled; one pair (n96/c8/out64 trial 2) shows a negligible +0.30% p95 delta.

evidence_refs.quote: # vLLM Per-Request Attention-Sink Retention Under Continuous Serving: A 3B-Model Stress Campaign

claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: Output preview comparisons reveal non-zero text divergence (2–17 differing previews per trial), increasing with output length, which prevents a claim of semantic equivalence.

evidence_refs.quote: # vLLM Per-Request Attention-Sink Retention Under Continuous Serving: A 3B-Model Stress Campaign

claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: The campaign was designed around a pre-specified kill gate: the patch would be rejected if it produced request errors or a p95 latency regression exceeding 10% relative to an unpatched baseline, measured under paired OpenAI-compatible continuous-serving conditions with Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct.
